summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitBeats new Spotify-style UI/UX layout. All core layout components are working perfectly including three-column design, navigation, player controls, and admin functionality. Minor session management issue persists.

ui_bugs.issue: Canciones navigation selector not found consistently
ui_bugs.impact: Minor navigation issue, other nav items work

integration_issues.issue: Frontend session expires quickly, requiring frequent re-login
integration_issues.impact: User experience - does not affect core functionality

passed_tests: Left sidebar with FitBeats logo, search, and navigation
Main content area displays albums grid correctly
Player bar at bottom with all controls (shuffle, prev, play/pause, next, repeat)
Navigation to Inicio, Álbumes, Playlists working
Admin link visible and clickable in sidebar
Admin panel interface with albums tab and management
Albums grid displays 3 albums with proper cards
Album hover effects and play buttons working
Player integration - clicking album play button updates player
Volume controls and player progress bar present
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider improving frontend session management to reduce frequent login requirements. Fix Canciones navigation selector. All Spotify-style layout functionality is working excellently.
